title: Caliz II: Wrapping Graal AOT
summary: Extending Caliz to create native images of Java "scripts" (single source files) with with Graal
content:
Extending Caliz to create native images of Java "scripts" (single source files) with with Graal

After I wrapped JVM 11 in the last video, it is now time to let Caliz use Graal AOT to create a native image. There are a few hurdles, though, so it took me some time.

As always, thanks to everyone who was there. 🌻 I had an amazing time.

Links to follow up:

  • Caliz
  • Scripting Java
  • Graal AOT

Watch the video.
